core_systems.label: Core systems involved (CRM, ERP, databases, SaaS)

api_availability.label: Which systems have APIs and what type (REST/GraphQL/SOAP)?

data_stores.label: Where data lives (databases, file shares, spreadsheets, email)

legacy_systems.label: Legacy systems with no API or limited access

data_sources.label: Data consumed and produced by the process

data_quality.label: Data quality — clean, consistent, complete? Known issues?

data_formats.label: Data formats (structured, semi-structured, unstructured)
data_formats.value: Mixed: Structured (Ariba portal — 22%), Semi-structured (PDF invoices via email — 68%), Unstructured (scanned paper/post — 10%). Invoice fields: supplier name, ABN, invoice number, date, line items, GST, total amount.

data_volume.label: Data volume per cycle and growth rate

data_sensitivity.label: Data sensitivity classification (PII, PHI, financial, etc.)

cloud_maturity.label: AWS account structure and existing services in use

networking.label: VPCs, private subnets, NAT, VPN/Direct Connect

auth_model.label: Overall auth model (SSO, IAM, service accounts, API keys)

network_boundaries.label: Network access constraints and firewall rules

rate_limits.label: API rate limits on key systems

vendor_constraints.label: Contractual limits on automation or API usage

encryption_requirements.label: Encryption requirements at rest and in transit
